channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)

item.title: Emails from 2025 show the role of Todd Blanche — then the Ju…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Emails from 2025 show the role of Todd Blanche — then the Justice Department's No. 2 official — in President Trump’s retribution push. It will likely be a flashpoint in Blanche's hearing to be attorney general on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: Emails from 2025 show the role of Todd Blanche — then the Justice Department's No. 2 official — in President Trump’s retribution push. It will likely be a flashpoint in Blanche's hearing to be attorney general on Wednesday.

item.title: 東松山市長に松坂氏 自民推薦ら2氏破る 中学校給食費の無償化、デマンドタクシー補助など強調

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA is set to wait until a…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA is set to wait until after the World Cup to take disciplinary action against outspoken players and coaches. Any sanction will depend on the referees’ reports and other contributing factors.
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: FIFA is set to wait until after the World Cup to take disciplinary action against outspoken players and coaches. Any sanction will depend on the referees’ reports and other contributing factors.

item.title: US President Trump said “massive” new oil deals with Iraq wo…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: US President Trump said “massive” new oil deals with Iraq would be announced soon as he hosted Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi and hailed the prospect of American companies doing more business in the country.
item.content:encoded: US President Trump said “massive” new oil deals with Iraq would be announced soon as he hosted Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi and hailed the prospect of American companies doing more business in the country.

item.title: The Trump administration says its trade fraud crackdown has …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The Trump administration says its trade fraud crackdown has already topped $1 billion in recoveries and alleged losses, less than a year after the launch of a task force dedicated to this initiative. https://cnn.it/4vqVpsf
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration says its trade fraud crackdown has already topped $1 billion in recoveries and alleged losses, less than a year after the launch of a task force dedicated to this initiative. https://cnn.it/4vqVpsf

item.title: #🔖世の中 これも国旗損壊？「穴あき」フラッグ制作者が思う 法案のばからしさ：朝日新聞 日本の国旗を傷つける行為を禁…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
これも国旗損壊？「穴あき」フラッグ制作者が思う　法案のばからしさ：朝日新聞

日本の国旗を傷つける行為を禁じる国旗損壊処罰法案の審議が国会で続くなか、SNSで注目を集めている旗がある。白地の中心に穴を開けた「アナアキーフラッグ」。処罰の網から巧みにすり抜けるようなデザインだが…
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
これも国旗損壊？「穴あき」フラッグ制作者が思う　法案のばからしさ：朝日新聞

日本の国旗を傷つける行為を禁じる国旗損壊処罰法案の審議が国会で続くなか、SNSで注目を集めている旗がある。白地の中心に穴を開けた「アナアキーフラッグ」。処罰の網から巧みにすり抜けるようなデザインだが…

item.description:

item.title: Breaking News: The Trump administration is said to have orde…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: The Trump administration is said to have ordered ICE to halt most vehicle stops after agents fatally shot a man in Houston and another in coastal Maine, both in their vehicles. nyti.ms/4vqR4VZ
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: The Trump administration is said to have ordered ICE to halt most vehicle stops after agents fatally shot a man in Houston and another in coastal Maine, both in their vehicles. nyti.ms/4vqR4VZ

item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: Nigeria pension assets jump 51% to $22.8 billion, regulator says reut.rs/4puZj23
item.content:encoded: Nigeria pension assets jump 51% to $22.8 billion, regulator says reut.rs/4puZj23

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー Claude Codeでレガシーシステムの刷新を進めた方法 導入 こんにちは、株式会社ナレッジセン…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
Claude Codeでレガシーシステムの刷新を進めた方法

導入 こんにちは、株式会社ナレッジセンスの須藤英寿です。 今回は、「Claude Code」を用いて、カナダの州政府が運用する大規模なシステムの刷新を進めた手法を紹介します。 サマリー システムを運用する上で常に課題になるのが、古くなったシステムの運用です。長年にわたって改修が積み重なり、全体像が把握しにくいま...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
Claude Codeでレガシーシステムの刷新を進めた方法

導入 こんにちは、株式会社ナレッジセンスの須藤英寿です。 今回は、「Claude Code」を用いて、カナダの州政府が運用する大規模なシステムの刷新を進めた手法を紹介します。 サマリー システムを運用する上で常に課題になるのが、古くなったシステムの運用です。長年にわたって改修が積み重なり、全体像が把握しにくいま...

item.title: Of all England’s great Black footballers, none has been the …

item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)

item.title: Mike D is set to release “Thank You,” the first new music fr…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Mike D is set to release “Thank You,” the first new music from a member of the Beastie Boys in 15 years since Adam Yauch, also known as MCA, died of cancer in 2012. Read our interview. nyti.ms/4x2x2CL
item.content:encoded: Mike D is set to release “Thank You,” the first new music from a member of the Beastie Boys in 15 years since Adam Yauch, also known as MCA, died of cancer in 2012. Read our interview. nyti.ms/4x2x2CL

item.title: A T. rex found buried on property belonging to a South Dakot…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: A T. rex found buried on property belonging to a South Dakota cattle rancher sells for $50.1 million, becoming the most expensive dinosaur sold at an auction.
item.content:encoded: A T. rex found buried on property belonging to a South Dakota cattle rancher sells for $50.1 million, becoming the most expensive dinosaur sold at an auction.
